_comment: Issue #1506: Subagent MCP server inheritance configuration
_doc: Claude Code subagents (spawned via Agent tool) do not automatically inherit project-local .mcp.json servers. This file documents the workaround: subagent frontmatter must explicitly declare mcpServers to use twl MCP tools.

usage.description: Add the following to agent frontmatter to enable twl MCP tools in subagents
